case_title: OLD REPUBLIC NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY VS. DENNIS O. KOPEMANN

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLD REPUBLIC NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KOPEMANN, DENNIS O. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLD REPUBLIC NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY SERVED JUN-18-2004, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE JUN-21-2004 AS TO DEFENDANT KOPEMANN, DENNIS O. PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JUL-22-2004 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLD REPUBLIC NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KOPEMANN, DENNIS O. OEX HEARING SET FOR DEC-13-2004 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 612
